# ✅ Deployment Checklist

## Pre-Deployment
- [ ] Supabase project created
- [ ] Database migrations run
- [ ] All API keys ready (Supabase, Gemini)
- [ ] Code pushed to GitHub main branch

## 1. Backend (Render)
- [ ] Create Render account
- [ ] New → Blueprint → Connect repo
- [ ] Set environment variables:
  - [ ] `SUPABASE_URL`
  - [ ] `SUPABASE_ANON_KEY`
  - [ ] `SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY`
  - [ ] `GEMINI_API_KEY`
- [ ] Wait for build (2-3 min)
- [ ] Test: `https://your-backend.onrender.com/health`
- [ ] Note backend URL: `_______________________________`

## 2. Frontend (Vercel)
- [ ] Install Vercel CLI: `npm i -g vercel`
- [ ] Login: `vercel login`
- [ ] Deploy: `cd frontend && vercel`
- [ ] Set environment variables:
  - [ ] `NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL` = Backend URL from step 1
  - [ ] `NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL`
  - [ ] `NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY`
- [ ] Deploy production: `vercel --prod`
- [ ] Note frontend URL: `_______________________________`

## 3. Update CORS
- [ ] Go to Render → Environment
- [ ] Update `CORS_ORIGINS` with Vercel URL
- [ ] Wait for auto-redeploy

## 4. Verify
- [ ] Frontend loads
- [ ] Three.js background shows
- [ ] No console errors
- [ ] Search works
- [ ] Can create account
- [ ] Can login
- [ ] Recommendations load

## 5. Modal (Optional - Later)
- [ ] Install: `pip install modal`
- [ ] Setup: `modal setup`
- [ ] Add secrets: `modal secret create supabase-credentials`
- [ ] Deploy: `modal deploy modal_app.py`
- [ ] Update backend `ML_SERVICE_URL`

## Post-Deployment
- [ ] Add custom domain (optional)
- [ ] Set up monitoring (Sentry)
- [ ] Add analytics
- [ ] Test on mobile
- [ ] Share with users! 🎉

---

## Quick Commands

```bash
# Deploy frontend
cd frontend
vercel --prod

# Deploy Modal
modal deploy modal_app.py

# Check backend logs
# Go to Render dashboard → Logs

# Check Modal logs  
modal app logs anivibe-ml
```

## URLs to Save

```
Frontend: https://_____________________.vercel.app
Backend:  https://_____________________.onrender.com
Modal:    https://_____________________.modal.run
Supabase: https://_____________________.supabase.co
```

## Environment Variables Quick Copy

**Backend (Render):**
```bash
ENVIRONMENT=production
DEBUG=false
SECRET_KEY=<auto-generated>
SUPABASE_URL=https://xxxxx.supabase.co
SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=eyJhbG...
SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY=eyJhbG...
GEMINI_API_KEY=AIzaSy...
CORS_ORIGINS=https://anivibe.vercel.app
USE_GPU=false
```

**Frontend (Vercel):**
```bash
NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=https://anivibe-backend.onrender.com/api/v1
NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL=https://xxxxx.supabase.co
NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=eyJhbG...
```
